name: pick-and-place
title: Pick an object and place it on the target
task: Pick the object and place it on the target
summary: A composite skill: reach to the object, close the gripper, carry to the place target. Each step is a registered skill run through its own capability gate and safety envelope; the composite checkpoints between steps so a fault mid-task resumes without redoing what's done.

steps.note: approach above the object, gripper open
close the gripper on the object
carry to the place target, gripper stays closed
